name: Jasper
story: Jasper does the classic ragdoll flop: pick him up and he simply becomes softer. His blue eyes have talked three separate volunteers into overtime cuddles.
He's a slow-blinking, easy-going kitten who naps through vacuuming. First-time adopters could not ask for a gentler start.

medical.notes: First FVRCP done; neuter is booked for next month — we'll handle it before adoption day.

photoAlt: Jasper, a cream ragdoll-mix kitten with blue eyes, lounging on a blanket
